description: Text selection, era navigation, hash routing, breadcrumbs

tests.name: Select Genesis
steps: From library view, find and click the Genesis text card
Wait for text view to load
Check sidebar shows Genesis eras (should be 16)
Verify main content header shows Genesis
tests.pass_criteria: Genesis text view loads with 16 eras in sidebar, header visible

tests.name: Select NT book (Romans)
steps: Return to library, find and click Romans card
Wait for text view to load
Check sidebar shows Romans eras
Verify content header shows Romans
tests.pass_criteria: Romans loads with eras visible in sidebar

tests.name: Select Apocryphal (1 Enoch)
steps: Return to library, find and click 1 Enoch card
Wait for text view to load
Check sidebar shows 1 Enoch eras
Verify content renders (eras only, no flow expected)
tests.pass_criteria: 1 Enoch loads with eras, no JS errors

tests.name: Back to library
steps: From any text view, find and click 'Back to Library' or library breadcrumb
Verify library grid re-renders with all text cards
tests.pass_criteria: Library grid visible again with text cards

tests.name: Era navigation
steps: Navigate to Genesis, click an era name in sidebar
Verify main content scrolls to that era's chapters
Check era header is visible
tests.pass_criteria: Main content scrolls to selected era, header visible

tests.name: Chapter card interaction
steps: Click on a chapter card within an era
Verify chapter expands or shows content
Check for flow translation text or study content
tests.pass_criteria: Chapter content displays with text/study material

tests.name: Hash routing - genesis
steps: Navigate to URL with #genesis hash
Verify Genesis loads automatically
Check sidebar shows Genesis eras
tests.pass_criteria: Genesis loads from URL hash without clicking

tests.name: Hash routing - romans
steps: Navigate to URL with #romans hash
Verify Romans loads automatically

tests.name: Breadcrumb navigation
steps: From a text view, look for breadcrumb links
Click the 'Library' breadcrumb
Verify returns to library view

tests.name: Category filter in library
steps: In library view, find category filter tabs/buttons
Click a specific category (e.g., 'Old Testament', 'New Testament')
Verify library filters to show only that category's texts
tests.pass_criteria: Library filters correctly, showing only selected category

tests.name: Mobile bottom nav
steps: Check bottom navigation bar has buttons
Click each bottom nav button
Verify each navigates to the correct view
tests.pass_criteria: All bottom nav buttons navigate to correct views

tests.name: Mobile text selection
steps: From mobile library, tap a text card
Verify text view loads with eras
Check content renders properly in mobile layout
tests.pass_criteria: Text view loads on mobile with proper layout
